mapper.insert: INSERT INTO complaints (user_id, merchant_id, order_id, content, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{orderId}, #{content}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, m.shop_name as merchantShopName, o.order_no, o.product_name FROM complaints c LEFT JOIN merchants m ON c.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.order_id = o.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.*, u.username, o.order_no, o.product_name FROM complaints c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.order_id = o.id WHERE c.merchant_id = #{merchantId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.*, u.username, m.shop_name as merchantShopName, o.order_no, o.product_name FROM complaints c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN merchants m ON c.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.order_id = o.id WHERE c.status = #{status} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.*, u.username, m.shop_name as merchantShopName, o.order_no, o.product_name FROM complaints c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN merchants m ON c.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.order_id = o.id ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE complaints SET status = #{status}, result = #{result} WHERE id = #{id}
